chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1592 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.6524/2022 3. For hearing of main case 06-12-2023 Mr. Sarfraz A. Akhund, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Habib Khan, Advocate for Respondents No.1-3 Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ Deputy Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners after arguing at some length submits that the petitioners have already filed a representation for promotion which if respondents are directed to decide in accordance with law he would be satisfied. Learned counsel for the respondents has accepted the proposal. Accordingly this petition is dismissed as not pressed. The respondents to decide the representation of the petitioners, if pending, in accordance with law in two months. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
